option.name: fileSummaryMaps
option.value: {"C:/Users/amitk/OneDrive/Documents/Java Full Stack-Lovepreet Singh/Expense-Tracker-App/AuthService":"{\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/auth/SecurityConfig.java\":\"This file appears to be a Spring Boot configuration class for security-related functionality. It does not contain any classes, but rather defines several beans and functions to configure the security settings for the application.\\n\\n`SecurityConfig`: This class configures the security settings for the Spring Boot application, including enabling method-level security, setting up CORS and CSRF protection, and defining the authentication provider and filter chain.\\n\\n`userDetailsService`: This function creates a `UserDetailsService` bean that is used to load user details for authentication purposes.\\n\\n`securityFilterChain`: This function defines the security filter chain, which includes configuring the CSRF and CORS settings, defining the authorized endpoints, and adding the JWT authentication filter.\\n\\n`authenticationProvider`: This function creates a `DaoAuthenticationProvider` bean that is used to authenticate users based on the user details service and password encoder.\\n\\n`authenticationManager`: This function creates an `AuthenticationManager` bean that is used to manage the authentication process.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/entities/UserRole.java\":\"This file defines a single class, `UserRole`, which represents a user role in a Spring Boot application.\\n\\n`UserRole`: A class that represents a user role, with properties for the role ID and name.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any functions, but rather defines the structure of the `UserRole` entity using Lombok annotations and JPA annotations.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/auth/UserConfig.java\":\"This file does not contain any classes, but it does contain one function:\\n\\n`passwordEncoder()`: This function returns a `BCryptPasswordEncoder` instance, which is used to securely hash and compare passwords in the application.\\n\\nThe file is a Spring Boot configuration class that sets up a `PasswordEncoder` bean, which is used by the application\\u0027s security layer to handle password-related operations.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/service/RefreshTokenService.java\":\"This file contains a service class for managing refresh tokens in a Spring Boot application.\\n\\n`RefreshTokenService`: A service class that handles the creation, verification, and retrieval of refresh tokens.\\n\\n`createRefreshToken`: Creates a new refresh token for a given user and saves it to the database.\\n`verifyExpiration`: Verifies the expiration of a given refresh token and deletes it if it has expired.\\n`findByToken`: Retrieves a refresh token from the database by its token value.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/response/JwtResponseDto.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `JwtResponseDto`, which is a data transfer object (DTO) used to represent the response from a JWT (JSON Web Token) authentication process.\\n\\n`JwtResponseDto`: A DTO class that holds the access token and the token itself, which are typically returned from a JWT-based authentication process.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions, as it is solely focused on defining the structure of the `JwtResponseDto` class using Lombok annotations for data, constructor, and builder patterns.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/request/AuthRequestDto.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `AuthRequestDto`, which is a data transfer object (DTO) used for handling authentication requests.\\n\\n`AuthRequestDto`: A DTO class that represents the data required for an authentication request, including the username and password.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions. It is a simple DTO class that is used to encapsulate the data required for an authentication request in a Spring Boot application.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/Main.java\":\"This file is the main entry point for a Spring Boot application. It sets up the application configuration, enables JPA repositories, and scans for components in specific packages.\\n\\n`Main`: This is the main class that bootstraps the Spring Boot application.\\n\\n`main(String[] args)`: This is the main method that runs the Spring Boot application.\\n\\nThe file also imports several classes and configurations, including `SecurityConfig` from the `org.springBoot.auth` package, and enables JPA repositories and component scanning for specific packages.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/request/RefreshTokenRequestDto.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `RefreshTokenRequestDto`, which is a data transfer object (DTO) used to represent a request for a refresh token.\\n\\n`RefreshTokenRequestDto`: A DTO class that holds a single string property, `token`, which represents the refresh token.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions. It is a simple DTO class used to encapsulate the data required for a refresh token request.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/entities/RefreshToken.java\":\"This file defines a `RefreshToken` entity class for a Spring Boot application.\\n\\n`RefreshToken`: A class that represents a refresh token, which is used for token-based authentication. It includes fields for the token, expiry date, and a one-to-one relationship with a `UserInfo` entity.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any functions, but rather defines the structure of the `RefreshToken` entity using JPA annotations and Lombok annotations for data modeling and code generation.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/entities/UserInfo.java\":\"This file defines a `UserInfo` entity class that represents a user in the application. It has the following properties:\\n\\n`UserInfo`: A class that represents a user in the application, with properties for user ID, username, password, and a set of user roles.\\n\\n`userId`: The unique identifier for the user.\\n`username`: The username of the user.\\n`password`: The password of the user.\\n`roles`: A set of `UserRole` objects that represent the roles assigned to the user.\\n\\nThe file also includes several annotations from the Lombok library, such as `@Data`, `@ToString`, `@NoArgsConstructor`, and `@AllArgsConstructor`, which provide automatic generation of getters, setters, and other boilerplate code.\\n\\nThe `@ManyToMany` annotation is used to define a many-to-many relationship between the `UserInfo` and `UserRole` entities, with the `user_roles` table used to store the mapping between users and their roles.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/model/UserInfoDto.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`UserInfoDto`: A data transfer object (DTO) that extends the `UserInfo` entity and includes properties for first name, last name, phone number, and email.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any functions. It is a simple DTO class that is used to transfer user information data between the application and the client.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/auth/JwtAuthFilter.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `JwtAuthFilter`, which is a Spring Security filter that handles JWT-based authentication.\\n\\n`JwtAuthFilter`: A Spring Security filter that extracts the JWT token from the request header, validates the token, and sets the authenticated user in the security context.\\n\\n`doFilterInternal`: This function is responsible for the main logic of the filter. It extracts the JWT token from the request header, validates the token, and sets the authenticated user in the security context if the token is valid.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/service/JwtService.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `JwtService`, which provides utility functions for generating, validating, and extracting information from JSON Web Tokens (JWT).\\n\\n`JwtService`: A service class that handles the generation, validation, and extraction of claims from JSON Web Tokens.\\n\\n`extractUsername`: Extracts the username from the provided JWT token.\\n`extractClaim`: Extracts a specific claim from the provided JWT token using a given function.\\n`extractExpiration`: Extracts the expiration date from the provided JWT token.\\n`isTokenExpired`: Checks if the provided JWT token has expired.\\n`validateToken`: Validates the provided JWT token against the given user details.\\n`GenerateToken`: Generates a new JWT token for the provided username.\\n`createToken`: Creates a new JWT token with the provided claims and username.\\n`extractAllClaims`: Extracts all the claims from the provided JWT token.\\n`getSignKey`: Retrieves the signing key used to sign the JWT token.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/service/UserDetailsServiceImpl.java\":\"`UserDetailsServiceImpl`: This class implements the `UserDetailsService` interface and provides functionality for user authentication and registration.\\n\\n`loadUserByUsername`: This function retrieves a user by their username and returns a `UserDetails` object.\\n\\n`checkIfUserAlreadyExists`: This function checks if a user with the given username already exists in the system.\\n\\n`signUpUser`: This function registers a new user by saving their information in the database and encoding their password.\\n\\nThis file contains a Spring Boot service implementation that handles user authentication and registration. It uses a `UserRepository` to interact with the user data and a `PasswordEncoder` to securely store user passwords.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/controller/TokenController.java\":\"This file appears to be a Spring Boot controller class that handles authentication and token management for a web application.\\n\\n`TokenController`: A controller class that handles authentication and token management for the application.\\n\\n`AuthenticateAndGetToken`: Authenticates a user and generates an access token and a refresh token.\\n`refreshToken`: Generates a new access token using a valid refresh token.\\n\\nThe file provides the following functionality:\\n\\n1. Authenticates a user using the `AuthenticationManager` and generates an access token and a refresh token.\\n2. Provides an endpoint to refresh the access token using a valid refresh token.\\n3. Utilizes the `JwtService` and `RefreshTokenService` to handle token generation and management.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/service/CustomUserDetails.java\":\"This file defines a custom `UserDetails` implementation called `CustomUserDetails` that extends the `UserInfo` entity and implements the `UserDetails` interface.\\n\\n`CustomUserDetails`: A custom `UserDetails` implementation that encapsulates user information and authorities.\\n\\n`CustomUserDetails(UserInfo)`: A constructor that initializes the `CustomUserDetails` instance with the provided `UserInfo` object.\\n\\n`getAuthorities()`: Returns the collection of granted authorities for the user.\\n\\n`getPassword()`: Returns the user\\u0027s password.\\n\\n`getUsername()`: Returns the user\\u0027s username.\\n\\n`isAccountNonExpired()`: Returns `true` if the user\\u0027s account is not expired.\\n\\n`isAccountNonLocked()`: Returns `true` if the user\\u0027s account is not locked.\\n\\n`isCredentialsNonExpired()`: Returns `true` if the user\\u0027s credentials are not expired.\\n\\n`isEnabled()`: Returns `true` if the user\\u0027s account is enabled.\",\"/build/reports/problems/problems-report.html\":\"This file appears to be a JavaScript module that generates a report for Gradle configuration cache problems. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines a single function `configurationCacheProblems()` that returns the report data. The file also includes a large amount of code that seems to be related to rendering the report UI.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/controller/AuthController.java\":\"`AuthController`: A REST controller class that handles user authentication and registration.\\n\\n`signUp`: Handles the user sign-up process, including creating a new user, generating a JWT token, and creating a refresh token.\\n\\nThis file contains a Spring Boot controller class `AuthController` that handles user authentication and registration. The `signUp` function is responsible for creating a new user, generating a JWT token, and creating a refresh token.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/repository/RefreshTokenRepository.java\":\"This file contains a single interface `RefreshTokenRepository` that extends the `CrudRepository` interface provided by Spring Data.\\n\\n`RefreshTokenRepository`: An interface that provides CRUD operations for the `RefreshToken` entity.\\n\\n`findByToken(String token)`: A method that retrieves an `Optional` of `RefreshToken` by the given token.\\n\\nThis file defines a repository interface for managing `RefreshToken` entities, which are likely used for token-based authentication or authorization in a Spring Boot application.\",\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/repository/UserRepository.java\":\"This file contains a single interface `UserRepository` that extends the `CrudRepository` interface provided by Spring Data.\\n\\n`UserRepository`: This interface provides CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations for the `UserInfo` entity, and also includes a custom method `findByUsername` to retrieve a `UserInfo` object by its username.\\n\\n`findByUsername`: This method allows you to retrieve a `UserInfo` object by its username.\"}"}

option.name: fileSkeletonMaps
option.value: {"C:/Users/amitk/OneDrive/Documents/Java Full Stack-Lovepreet request, HttpServletResponse response, FilterChain filterChain)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"HttpServletRequest\",\"name\":\"request\"},{\"type\":\"HttpServletResponse\",\"name\":\"response\"},{\"type\":\"FilterChain\",\"name\":\"filterChain\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[32,4],[55,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/auth/SecurityConfig.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/auth/SecurityConfig.java\",\"file_name\":\"SecurityConfig.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"userDetailsService\",\"method_parameters\":\"(UserRepository jwtAuthFilter)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"HttpSecurity\",\"name\":\"http\"},{\"type\":\"JwtAuthFilter\",\"name\":\"jwtAuthFilter\"}],\"return_type\":\"SecurityFilterChain\",\"scope\":[[39,4],[53,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"authenticationProvider\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"AuthenticationProvider\",\"scope\":[[55,4],[62,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"authenticationManager\",\"method_parameters\":\"(AuthenticationConfiguration token)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"token\"}],\"return_type\":\"String\",\"scope\":[[25,4],[27,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"extractClaim\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String token, Function\\u003cClaims, T\\u003e claimsResolver)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"token\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"claimsResolver\"}],\"return_type\":\"T\",\"scope\":[[29,4],[32,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"extractExpiration\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String token)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"token\"}],\"return_type\":\"Date\",\"scope\":[[34,4],[36,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"isTokenExpired\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String token)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"token\"}],\"return_type\":\"Boolean\",\"scope\":[[38,4],[40,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"validateToken\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String token, UserDetails userDetails)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"token\"},{\"type\":\"UserDetails\",\"name\":\"userDetails\"}],\"return_type\":\"Boolean\",\"scope\":[[42,4],[45,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"GenerateToken\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String username)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"username\"}],\"return_type\":\"String\",\"scope\":[[47,4],[50,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"createToken\",\"method_parameters\":\"(Map\\u003cString, Object\\u003e claims, String username)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"claims\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"username\"}],\"return_type\":\"String\",\"scope\":[[52,4],[60,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"extractAllClaims\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String token)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"token\"}],\"return_type\":\"Claims\",\"scope\":[[62,4],[68,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getSignKey\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"Key\",\"scope\":[[70,4],[73,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/service/RefreshTokenService.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/service/RefreshTokenService.java\",\"file_name\":\"RefreshTokenService.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"createRefreshToken\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String userName)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"userName\"}],\"return_type\":\"RefreshToken\",\"scope\":[[21,4],[29,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"verifyExpiration\",\"method_parameters\":\"(RefreshToken token)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"RefreshToken\",\"name\":\"token\"}],\"return_type\":\"RefreshToken\",\"scope\":[[31,4],[37,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"findByToken\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String token)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"token\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[39,4],[41,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/service/UserDetailsServiceImpl.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/service/UserDetailsServiceImpl.java\",\"file_name\":\"UserDetailsServiceImpl.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"loadUserByUsername\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String userName)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"userName\"}],\"return_type\":\"UserDetails\",\"scope\":[[32,4],[44,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"checkIfUserAlreadyExists\",\"method_parameters\":\"(UserInfoDto userInfoDto)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"UserInfoDto\",\"name\":\"userInfoDto\"}],\"return_type\":\"UserInfo\",\"scope\":[[46,4],[48,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"signUpUser\",\"method_parameters\":\"(UserInfoDto userInfoDto)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"UserInfoDto\",\"name\":\"userInfoDto\"}],\"return_type\":\"Boolean\",\"scope\":[[50,4],[64,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/Main.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/org/springBoot/Main.java\",\"file_name\":\"Main.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"main\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String[] args)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"args\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[15,4],[17,5]]}]}}"}
